    Description
    static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID>
    void
    JoinedEntityHelper.delete(QueryTemplate queryTemplate, Model<E,ID> model, E entity)
    Deletes a joined entity from both the extension and base tables.
    static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID>
    void
    JoinedEntityHelper.deleteBatch(QueryTemplate queryTemplate, Model<E,ID> model, List<E> entities)
    Deletes a batch of joined entities from both extension and base tables.
    static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID>
    void
    JoinedEntityHelper.deleteBatchByRef(QueryTemplate queryTemplate, Model<E,ID> model, List<Ref<E>> refs)
    Deletes a batch of joined entities by reference from all extension and base tables.
    static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID>
    void
    JoinedEntityHelper.deleteById(QueryTemplate queryTemplate, Model<E,ID> model, ID id)
    Deletes a joined entity by primary key from all extension and base tables.
    static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID>
    void
    JoinedEntityHelper.insert(QueryTemplate queryTemplate, Model<E,ID> model, E entity)
    Inserts a joined entity into both the base and extension tables.
    static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID>
    ID
    JoinedEntityHelper.insertAndFetchId(QueryTemplate queryTemplate, Model<E,ID> model, E entity)
    Inserts a joined entity and returns the generated primary key.
    static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID>
    List<ID>
    JoinedEntityHelper.insertBatch(QueryTemplate queryTemplate, Model<E,ID> model, List<E> entities)
    Inserts a batch of joined entities into both the base and extension tables.

    void
    JoinedEntityHelper.insertExtensionTables(QueryTemplate queryTemplate, Model<E,ID> model, List<E> entities, List<ID> ids)
    Inserts extension table rows for a batch of joined entities.
    static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID>
    void

    Updates a joined entity in both the base and extension tables.

    void
    JoinedEntityHelper.updateBatch(QueryTemplate queryTemplate, Model<E,ID> model, List<E> entities)
    Updates a batch of joined entities in both the base and extension tables.
